installPrompt: Install this app on your home screen
iosHint: Tap the Share icon, then "Add to Home Screen"
enablePush: Get notified about live classes and new lessons

guide.title: Install the app
guide.subtitle: Add this app to your home screen for the fastest access — it opens full-screen, like a native app.
guide.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in the toolbar.
guide.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap “Add to Home Screen”.
guide.iosStep3: Tap “Add” — the app appears on your home screen.
guide.iosNote: Open this page in Safari — other iPhone browsers can’t add to the home screen.
guide.androidStep1: Tap the ⋮ menu in the top-right.
guide.desktopNote: On a computer, click the install icon in your browser’s address bar.
guide.installedBody: The app is installed on your device.
